title: manihot palmata var. pusilla
intro: Manihot palmata var. pusilla, also known as the dwarf or small cassava, is a small-stemmed shrub belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family and native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Manihot palmata var. pusilla include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by boiling or drying its leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams for various health applications.
